description.unified: Deals Magic Damage to an enemy and restores HP equal to 25% of the damage dealt. For [(added) 6 sec], reduces the target's Attack by [(added) 20%] and increases your Attack by [(added) 10%]. The Attack increase effect stacks up to [(added) 5 times].

Moves to the farthest enemy and deals Magic Damage to the target and nearby enemies, increasing their Magic Damage taken by [30%->35%] for [10 sec->5 sec]. If enemies remain nearby after using the skill, additionally uses [Absorbing Strike].
Deals Magic Damage 4 times to enemies within range. You cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and all damage taken is reduced by [(added) 50%].
When an enemy is killed, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and [Harvest] is stacked 1 times. [Harvest]: For 12 sec, Attack increases, stacking up to 10 times.

IV.unified: When an enemy is killed, restores [1 orb->1000] of your Mana.

dark.unified: Mana cost is increased by [(added) 1000], but cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.
Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but damage is increased by [(added) 80%].
Mana cost is increased by [(added) 2000], but [Harvest] is triggered once.
If stacks are 5 or more, cooldown is additionally reduced by 1 sec every second.

description.unified: [Absorbing Blow] increases DMG by {0}% and resets its Cooldown upon killing an enemy.
[Devil's Prom] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: When hitting with a skill, reduces the target's Magic Defense by [20%->6%] and increases your Attack by [2%->6%] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to [10->6] times.

description.unified: On hit, has a 25% chance to deal additional Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase your Attack by {1}%. The Attack increase stacks up to 10 times.
